description: Magical sites, both natural and crafted, where the impossible becomes ordinary. Places of wonder, peril, and power that shape the world around them.
locations: A slab of earth and stone drifts overhead, trailing roots and waterfalls. Its shadow passes like a slow cloud across the land below.
An arc of solid light stretching between two high places. It hums underfoot and the colors shift with each step.
A stone span over dark water, its underside scarred by claws. Bones are wedged between the stones and the toll is never coin.
A slab of earth and stone drifts overhead, trailing roots and waterfalls. Its shadow passes like a slow cloud across the land below.
